channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Are We Going to Refund Planned Parenthood?
item.description: Republicans must regain their seriousness on the issue of life.

item.title: How Did Lafayette Become America's Favorite Frenchman?
item.description: Starting today, NR donors who give $250 and up will receive a free copy of my forthcoming book on the hero of two revolutions.

item.title: The Quietly Competent Side of the Trump Administration
item.description: Amid controversies large and small, the administration is moving diligently to dismantle decades of woke racial discrimination.

item.title: Don't Hold Section 702 Renewal Hostage to the SAVE America Act
item.description: There is a difference between hardball that exploits leverage and a poison pill that kills that leverage.
